metadata.description: Clean initial direct-SPARQL ACE playbook for mistral_7b_instruct / empirical_research_practice.

bullets.title: Use empirical ORKG contribution pattern
bullets.content: For empirical research practice direct SPARQL, always connect papers to their contribution node and type the contribution with the empirical research practice contribution class before querying template fields.
bullets.avoid: Do not query empirical template properties directly from ?paper unless the field is publication year.
bullets.applicability: Empirical research practice direct SPARQL queries.

bullets.title: Use the default empirical venue filter
bullets.content: For empirical research practice questions, include the IEEE International Requirements Engineering Conference venue filter unless the question asks for all venues or compares venues.
bullets.avoid: Do not omit the default venue filter for ordinary empirical research practice questions.
bullets.positive_pattern: Filter venue label to IEEE International Requirements Engineering Conference unless the question asks otherwise.
bullets.applicability: Empirical research practice direct SPARQL queries.
